series_metadata.series_description: File that are maintained on employees who request reasonable accommodation. Records may include: Reasonable Accommodation Employee Request; Reasonable Accommodation Supervisor’s Report; Reasonable Accommodation Treating Sources Report; correspondence; notes; purchase orders; any additional record relating to the employee’s reasonable accommodations and disposition of accommodation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for length of employment. Destroy three (3) calendar years after employment is terminated. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Retain for length of employment. Destroy three (3) calendar years after employment is terminated. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
